name: sparklogs-redact
description: Monorepo for @sparklogs/redact-* — consistent PII pseudonymisation + residual-PII scanning for logs. Framework-agnostic core, a Node CLI, and (forthcoming) React components for in-browser redaction.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @sparklogs/redact-core && npm run build -w @sparklogs/redact-cli
